title: Puig stock soars 15% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
summary_full: Shares of Puig Brands soared as much as 15% Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.
summary_public: Shares of Puig Brands soared as much as 15% Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.
